has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: MSG_ATTRIBUTES
metadata.comment: Records of all message attributes associated to messages that have occurred on Sei, dating back to the genesis block.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_SUB_GROUP.name: MSG_SUB_GROUP
MSG_SUB_GROUP.comment: Silver only -- Numeric value grouping different messages together to represent a single action within a group. This is relevent for exec actions that contain mutiple underlying actions. NULL sub group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: Short for "message index," the position in which messages occur in a transaction.

MSG_TYPE.name: MSG_TYPE
MSG_TYPE.comment: A string containing information about the type of message occurring.

ATTRIBUTE_KEY.name: ATTRIBUTE_KEY
ATTRIBUTE_KEY.comment: They key from the key-value pair from the message attribute

ATTRIBUTE_VALUE.name: ATTRIBUTE_VALUE
ATTRIBUTE_VALUE.comment: They value from the key-value pair from the message attribute

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The time the block was inserted into to the Flipside database.

row_count.label: Row Count
row_count.description: An approximate count of rows in this table

bytes.label: Approximate Size
bytes.description: Approximate size of the table as reported by Snowflake

clustering_key.description: The key used to cluster this table

metadata.name: FACT_GOVERNANCE_SUBMIT_PROPOSAL
metadata.comment: Records of all proposal submissions on Osmosis, dating back to the Genesis block. The columns blockchain, chain_id, and tx_status will be deprecating soon.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

PROPOSER.name: PROPOSER
PROPOSER.comment: The address of the validator that submitted the proposal.

PROPOSAL_ID.name: PROPOSAL_ID
PROPOSAL_ID.comment: Numeric ID that corresponds to the proposal.

PROPOSAL_TYPE.name: PROPOSAL_TYPE
PROPOSAL_TYPE.comment: The type of proposal that was submitted.

PROPOSAL_TITLE.name: PROPOSAL_TITLE
PROPOSAL_TITLE.comment: The title of the governance proposal that was submitted on-chain.

metadata.name: TRANSACTIONS_FINAL
metadata.comment: Records of all transactions that have occurred on Osmosis, dating back to the genesis block. The columns blockchain, chain_id, and tx_status will be deprecating soon.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TX_FROM.name: TX_FROM
TX_FROM.comment: The wallet address of the individual who initiated the transaction

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

FEE.name: FEE
FEE.comment: The fee is paid by the initiator of the transaction. Fee = gas * gas price and is given in micro-SEI.

GAS_USED.name: GAS_USED
GAS_USED.comment: The amount of gas consumed by the transaction.

GAS_WANTED.name: GAS_WANTED
GAS_WANTED.comment: Amount of gas requested for a transaction. It is provided by users when the transaction is generated.

TX_CODE.name: TX_CODE
TX_CODE.comment: A number that corresponds to various error codes. When "0", the transaction is successful. Non-zero numbers signify different types of transaction failures.

MSGS.name: MSGS
MSGS.comment: the undecoded messages in the transaction

metadata.name: FACT_STAKING
metadata.comment: Records of all staking related transactions that have occurred on Sei, dating back to the genesis block. These actions include delegate, undelegate, and redelegate.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP

TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

TX_CALLER_ADDRESS.name: TX_CALLER_ADDRESS
TX_CALLER_ADDRESS.comment: The wallet address of the individual who initiated the transaction.

ACTION.comment: The action taken in the msg group. For staking this includes delegate, undelegate, redelegate, withdraw_rewards.

CURRENCY.comment: The currency that was used in the transaction message.

REDELEGATE_SOURCE_VALIDATOR_ADDRESS.comment: The wallet address of the source alidator in a redelegation staking action.

metadata.name: FACT_MSGS
metadata.comment: Records of all message attributes associated to messages that have occurred on Sei, dating back to the genesis block.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: Short for "message index," the position in which messages occur in a transaction.

MSG_TYPE.name: MSG_TYPE
MSG_TYPE.comment: A string containing information about the type of message occurring.

MSG.name: MSG
MSG.comment: A block of json that contains the message attributes in base64 encoding.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: MSGS
metadata.comment: Records of all messages associated to transactions that have occurred on Sei, dating back to the genesis block.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_SUB_GROUP.name: MSG_SUB_GROUP
MSG_SUB_GROUP.comment: Silver only -- Numeric value grouping different messages together to represent a single action within a group. This is relevent for exec actions that contain mutiple underlying actions. NULL sub group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: Short for "message index," the position in which messages occur in a transaction.

MSG_TYPE.name: MSG_TYPE
MSG_TYPE.comment: A string containing information about the type of message occurring.

MSG.name: MSG
MSG.comment: The underlying json from the message or event within the transactions

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The time the block was inserted into to the Flipside database.

metadata.name: FACT_STAKING_REWARDS
metadata.comment: Records of all claimed rewards earned from staking that have occurred on Osmosis, dating back to the genesis block. These actions include claim and withdrawal_rewards. The columns blockchain, chain_id, and tx_status will be deprecating soon.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

TX_CALLER_ADDRESS.name: TX_CALLER_ADDRESS
TX_CALLER_ADDRESS.comment: The wallet address of the individual who initiated the transaction.

ACTION.name: ACTION
ACTION.comment: The action taken in the msg group. For staking this includes delegate, undelegate, redelegate, withdraw_rewards.

DELEGATOR_ADDRESS.name: DELEGATOR_ADDRESS
DELEGATOR_ADDRESS.comment: The wallet address of the individual who owns the delegated asset.

REWARDS_RECIPIENT.name: REWARDS_RECIPIENT
REWARDS_RECIPIENT.comment: The wallet address of the individual who owns the delegated asset.

VALIDATOR_ADDRESS.name: VALIDATOR_ADDRESS
VALIDATOR_ADDRESS.comment: The wallet address of the validator related to the staking action.

AMOUNT.comment: The amount that was used in the transaction message.

CURRENCY.comment: The currency that was used in the transaction message.

DAY_OF_WEEK_NAME.comment: day of week name for DATE_DAY

DAY_OF_WEEK_NAME_SHORT.name: DAY_OF_WEEK_NAME_SHORT
DAY_OF_WEEK_NAME_SHORT.comment: day of week abbreviation for DATE_DAY

WEEK_START_DATE.comment: date representing the start of the week for DATE_DAY

WEEK_END_DATE.name: WEEK_END_DATE
WEEK_END_DATE.comment: date representing the end of the week for DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_START_DATE.name: PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_START_DATE
PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_START_DATE.comment: date representing the start of the week for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_END_DATE.name: PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_END_DATE
PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_END_DATE.comment: date representing the end of the week for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

ISO_WEEK_END_DATE.comment: ISO date representing the end of the week for DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_START_DATE.comment: ISO date representing the start of the week for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_END_DATE.name: PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_END_DATE
PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_END_DATE.comment: ISO date representing the end of the week for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR.name: ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR
ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR.comment: number representing the ISO week of the year for DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_OF_YEAR.name: PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_OF_YEAR
PRIOR_YEAR_WEEK_OF_YEAR.comment: number representing the week of the year for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

PRIOR_YEAR_ISO_WEEK_OF_YEAR.comment: number representing the ISO week of the year for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

MONTH_END_DATE.name: MONTH_END_DATE

PRIOR_YEAR_MONTH_END_DATE.comment: last date of month for PRIOR_YEAR_DATE_DAY

metadata.name: ADDRESS_TAGS
metadata.comment: Holds data for our address tags.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: The blockchain that the address belongs to.

CREATOR.name: CREATOR
CREATOR.comment: Who created the tag. 'flipside' for official flipside tags.

ADDRESS.name: ADDRESS
ADDRESS.comment: The address of the contract or wallet the tag describes.

START_DATE.name: START_DATE
START_DATE.comment: Date the tag first applies. For tags that are permanent, this might be the date the address had its first behavior that warrants its tag, or the addresses' first transaction.

END_DATE.name: END_DATE
END_DATE.comment: Date the tag no longer applies (for tags that are permanent or currently active, end_date can be NULL).

TAG_CREATED_AT.name: TAG_CREATED_AT
TAG_CREATED_AT.comment: Date the tag was added to our data.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

INSERT_DATE.name: INSERT_DATE
INSERT_DATE.comment: The date the label was inserted in the table

ADDRESS.name: ADDRESS
ADDRESS.comment: Address that the label is for. This is the field that should be used to join other tables with labels.

CREATOR.name: CREATOR
CREATOR.comment: The name of the creator of the label

LABEL_TYPE.name: LABEL_TYPE
LABEL_TYPE.comment: A high-level category describing the addresses main function or ownership

LABEL_SUBTYPE.name: LABEL_SUBTYPE
LABEL_SUBTYPE.comment: A sub-category nested within label type providing further detail

PROJECT_NAME.name: PROJECT_NAME
PROJECT_NAME.comment: Name of the controlling entity of the address
